title: Upload files to infobox
excerpt: It returns error (There were an error uploading some of the files, please review) when you upload a pdf file (<100 mb) to infobox (“add files” or “add notes”)

posts.author: reisb (Reinaldo Santos Barros)
posts.cookedHtml: It returns error (There were an error uploading some of the files, please review) when you upload a pdf file (<100 mb) to infobox (“add files” or “add notes”)

posts.author: olivervaagen (Oliver Vaagen)
posts.cookedHtml: Infobox seems to be a deprecated feature. See more here Info Boxes Deprecation and Bug
